biography: Aml Ameen, born July 30, 1985, in London, is a talented British actor whose career has flourished across film and television. He gained early acclaim for his role as Trife in "Kidulthood." Ameen showcased his versatility in "The Maze Runner" series and captivated audiences in "Yardie." His TV credits include "The Bill," "Sense8," and "I May Destroy You." Ameen's performances are marked by depth and authenticity, showcasing a remarkable ability to immerse himself in diverse characters, solidifying his status as a compelling and promising talent in the entertainment industry.
name: Aml Ameen
